generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearwheel gearbox of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderPositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor providing the input current I_M to the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance ControllerAngleOutput : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Robot controller delivering the output angle for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance ControllerAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControllerAngleOutput
]

// C10: Data (derived and trace data)
instance ComputedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data calculated from motor current and encoder positions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingComponent
]

instance ComputedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity data computed from successive encoder position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingComponent
]

instance ComputedAngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration data computed from angular velocity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingComponent
]

instance TorqueTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Array trace of torque values recorded during operation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationComponent
]

instance AngularVelocityTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Array trace of angular velocity values recorded during operation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationComponent
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MqttBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used to stream live sensor measurements from the robot to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiveDataStreamingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) that links data traces to SysML and Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelIntegrationService, ModelBasedControlAdaptationService
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModels : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable models of gearbox friction (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance WebDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard for real‑time visualization of torque and velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance DataProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component that consumes incoming MQTT data and computes derived torque, velocity, and acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataComputationService
]

instance DataVisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component that renders data traces on the dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance LiveDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous streaming of live sensor measurements via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveDataInsight
]

instance ModelIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML structural model and Simulink friction models through the AAS"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelTraceabilityInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of gearbox friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) using Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of torque and angular velocity traces in the unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance DataComputationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation of derived torque, angular velocity and acceleration from raw sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Rendering of data trace arrays on the web dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceVisualizationInsight
]

instance ModelBasedControlAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model‑based adaptation of control parameters to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance LiveDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live sensor data are available for downstream analysis"
]

instance ModelTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Each data point can be traced back to its originating SysML and Simulink model element"
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified friction parameters for the gearbox are derived from sensor streams"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operators can monitor torque and velocity in real time on the dashboard"
]

instance ComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived torque, velocity and acceleration are computed in real time"
]

instance TraceVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical trace data are visualized for analysis"
]

// C17: Actions
instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust controller parameters based on identified friction to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataTraceabilityAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Link data points to source sensors and models for auditability"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C10: Models
instance FirstAxisSysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams describing motor, gearwheel gearbox, and cycloidal gearbox of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionModels
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionModels
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Dahl friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionModels
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing LuGre friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionModels
]

instance DataCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model that calculates derived torque and velocity from sensor measurements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation; data are processed and visualized as they are received from the physical system."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow consisting of a Purpose class (FrictionDerivation), an Asset class (Mabi), Sources (physical sensors), DataTraces (measured and simulated), Processing components that run simulation models, and Models (engineering, simulation, data‑calculation) linked together to provide friction analysis for the first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the design stage (engineering SysML models of structure), the simulation stage (Simulink friction models), and the operational stage (real‑time digital shadow during robot usage), thereby representing as‑designed, as‑simulated and as‑operated phases of the physical system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each data point to its source and processing model ensures that the generated friction estimates are verifiable; continuous identification accommodates wear and changing operating conditions, providing up‑to‑date model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow over the MQTT protocol; the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) provides the semantic linkage between data and models."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation uses the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for representing the asset and its data, aligning with Industry 4.0 specification."
]
